images.caption: Figure 1:Comparison ofDSL-based scenario generation approaches and Chat2Scenic. While prior methods assemble existing DSL components or directly generate DSL programs, Chat2Scenic iteratively generates DSL blocks that interact with the database to create complex driving scenarios.

Figure 2:Overview of the Chat2Scenic framework, consisting of three core modules: theInteractive Moduleinteractively refines and interprets user queries into logical components; theGeneration Modulesynthesizes relatedDSLsnippets based on these components, integrating theRAG Moduleto retrieve domain specific knowledge.
Figure 5:Example scenarios from three sources: a) CARLA leaderboard, b) UN R171, c) NHTSA Crash.
